s17 rederive: 19-form mult-vs-shift-vs-add canonicalization sweep closes frontier item #3 (t0-arithmetic-spelling axis) with sharp asymmetric mechanism split; no closer, vT40 floor 4 holds.

frontier.hypothesis: The s14 w05 permuter campaign (PID 3756068, s32 tbaseS chassis, base=220) or s13 z07 campaign (PID 3540094, u8* tbase chassis) has produced a novel sub-220 find since s14/s16 launched (~24h+ elapsed).
frontier.mechanism: Both campaigns run detached under WSL sampling in structurally distinct masked-4 basins; extended sampling can still yield a masked <=3 find at any moment. w05 was recommended in s13 frontier as the highest-signal untriaged basin; unchanged since s16.
frontier.next_probe: Non-forensics session: check tmp/grind/marionation_Exec/s14/perm_w05/output-* and s13/perm_z07/output-*; triage sub-200 finds via s4/adiff2.py + s2 sandbox splice; reject uninitialized-read (vP160 class) or +insn (>179 build).

frontier.hypothesis: The twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 (parked, distance 7, 5 rules) exchange lever remains untried; solving twin first could yield the register-exchange technique transferable to marionation_Exec's pair-swap.
frontier.mechanism: Judge-constraints ledger: develop the exchange lever on the CHEAPER twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 FIRST (its ip/g3 residual is the exchange alone; masked ~6->0 on flip), then mirror here. Decisive allocation-equation material is in pre-merge commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb.
frontier.next_probe: Non-forensics session: route queue such that cpu_side_move_dir_4 gets its own session before further marionation_Exec permuter campaigns. Read the pre-merge commits BEFORE another permuter campaign here.

frontier.hypothesis: Compiler-flag or preprocessor-macro lever (fewer-conjunctions, -fno-force-mem, __attribute__((unused)) on decls, -fno-schedule-insns2 subset, etc.) at candidate-file scope could shift sched2 pass behavior on the T-14 tie without touching source arithmetic.
frontier.mechanism: s17 CONFIRMED the T-14 tie is decided by scheduler-internal INSN_LUID from rank_for_schedule, not by expand opcode. If any per-file compilation flag alters rank_for_schedule's forward/backward walk seed OR alters sched2's tie-break priority, the LUID landscape could shift without new C. GCC 2.7.2 has -fno-schedule-insns2 (kills sched2 entirely - would probably break other functions); -fno-cse-follow-jumps; -fno-move-loop-invariants; other stage-selective flags.
frontier.next_probe: Structural/forensics session: enumerate GCC 2.7.2 -fdisable-* / -fno-* flags via `cc1 --help` output; test single-flag additions to system.c compilation via a wrapper cc1 shim (or Makefile override) with just marionation_Exec's file; measure sandbox. Flags known-safe (no other-fn regression) go to a per-file compile-flags mechanism. Untried in ledger.

judge_constraints: FINAL owner ruling 2026-07-06 (do-while-zero-exception.md): do-while(0) sanctioned for ANY codegen effect incl. RA weighting, mandatory inline FAKE annotation; nested wraps additionally need a single-level-insufficient justification. The interim not-sanctioned ruling is superseded. STILL FORBIDDEN: regfix, register pins, __asm__ injection, semantic-lie C (cross-symbol derivation, per 2026-07-05).

candidate.c = vT40 (masked 4, verified): layer-1 review round-3 verdict was PASS-except-one — the NESTED wrap at line ~111 was held NEEDS_USER at the time; under the FINAL ruling it needs a documented single-level-insufficient justification (vT44 battery was staged to eliminate it entirely — check evidence). The Judge must independently verify that justification or its elimination.

Residual gap is 2 root-caused items (see evidence: pair-swap @56/57 coupled fixed point — sched2 LUID tie + qty_compare 5.33v5.33 tie; wrap toolbox measured DEAD for this pair). Do NOT re-derive the 140-ordering sweep, the 9-variant topology sweep, or the cc1psx parity test — all closed negative. Active lever at handoff: rich-pass permuter on the vT40 base.

STRATEGY (fable-blitz 2026-07-07): develop the exchange lever on the CHEAPER twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 FIRST (its ip/g3 residual is the exchange alone; masked ~6->0 on flip), then mirror here. The decisive allocation-equation material is in pre-merge commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb (sessions 6f-6h: in-place basin correction, final qty_compare equation, s4 half-flip) — NOT fully represented in this ledger's s1-s3; read those commits before another permuter campaign.
